definition.title: Malcolm McLean / Shipping Containerization (Authority Analogy Video)
definition.objective: Institutional-grade credibility. Connecting LHS to Malcolm McLean + Peter Drucker + Forbes publisher. Historical parallel. The kind of framing that resonates with investors, carriers, policymakers, and industry media.
definition.target_audience: LinkedIn professionals (primary), investors, carriers, policymakers, industry media
definition.cadence: Evergreen authority. LinkedIn 1-2x per quarter. Use around infrastructure news, investor discussions, conference moments

campaign_card.target_audience: LinkedIn professionals (primary), investors, carriers, policymakers, industry media
campaign_card.campaign_name: Malcolm McLean / Shipping Containerization (Authority Analogy Video)
key_messages: Containerization reduced shipping cost from $5.86/ton to $0.16 — a 36-fold savings
Peter Drucker's 3 greatest post-WWII advancements: Jets, Microchip, Containerization
A ship earns money at sea — a truck only makes money when the wheels are rolling

initiatives: LinkedIn authority thread (McLean history to LHS parallel). Quote graphics (ships at sea / trucks on road). Carousel (5-slide progression).

_legacy_card.description: Jeff draws direct analogy between Malcolm McLean's shipping containerization revolution and LineHaul Station's freight relay network. Sourced from conversation with Rich Karlgaard (former Chief Publisher of Forbes Magazine).
_legacy_card.strategic_purpose: Institutional-grade credibility. Connecting LHS to Malcolm McLean + Peter Drucker + Forbes publisher. Historical parallel. The kind of framing that resonates with investors, carriers, policymakers, and industry media.
_legacy_card.pre_approved_angles: Malcolm McLean historical parallel. $5.86 to $0.16 containerization savings. Peter Drucker's 3 greatest post-WWII innovations. Forbes publisher endorsement. Ships/trucks mirror quote.
_legacy_card.artlist_cost: Zero for repurposing existing video and script mining.
_legacy_card.repurposing: LinkedIn authority thread (McLean history to LHS parallel). Quote graphics (ships at sea / trucks on road). Carousel (5-slide progression). Video clips from Vimeo. Investor content framing.
_legacy_card.timeline: Evergreen authority. LinkedIn 1-2x per quarter. Use around infrastructure news, investor discussions, conference moments.
